fixturePurpose: Documentation-only example for ACP-GAP-001; this file is not a production schema and does not bypass artifact validation.

producer.trustBoundary: Copilot review text, suggestions, and thread state are review input. The control plane uses resolved-thread evidence and policy decisions, not raw generated text alone.

source.reviewSurface: review body, inline comments, suggestions, requested changes, and thread resolution state

rawSignals.value: Copilot reviewed changed files and generated actionable comments.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: The review body is source evidence only; each actionable item needs disposition.

rawSignals.value: Rename a column to avoid implying raw output is already a judgment artifact.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: The comment becomes resolved review evidence only after a maintainer replies and resolves the thread.

rawSignals.value: Use exact canonical product terminology in documentation.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: Suggested text must be reviewed like any other producer output before merge.

commands.evidenceUse: Review completeness evidence; command path is environment-specific and should be recorded in PR evidence.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: All actionable AI review threads were replied to and resolved.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: Resolved thread state can support a policy decision; Copilot text alone cannot approve the PR.

expectedArtifacts.purpose: Allow gates to treat unresolved AI review threads as blockers and resolved threads as satisfied review evidence.
Optionally connect review-driven commits to the changed-file and evidence summary.
Return unresolved AI comments as compact blockers when they remain open.

knownGaps.summary: Raw Copilot review examples are descriptive fixtures, not a raw review schema.
Future PR summary surface should show missing evidence and gap IDs without requiring heavy lanes for ordinary PRs.
Future policy-gate report-only context may consume normalized agent-assurance findings.
